Localization.Description: Firewall was disabled or its configuration was changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed firewall configuration file "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped firewall service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started a process with a command to disable a firewall or change its configuration on host {event_src.host}
